move_selection_options.best: Select move with highest win rate and popularity
move_selection_options.random: Weighted random selection based on game frequency
move_selection_options.intelligent_random: Smart random selection with opening variety management

description.min_games: Minimum games required to consider a move
description.request_delay: Delay between API requests (seconds) - respectful rate limiting
description.cache_ttl_minutes: How long to cache position data (minutes)
description.move_selection: Strategy for selecting moves: best, popular, random, or intelligent_random
description.min_games_gap: Minimum games before repeating the same opening
description.max_retries: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed requests
description.base_retry_delay: Base delay for exponential backoff retry strategy (seconds)
description.fallback_enabled: Enable fallback mechanisms when network is unavailable
